courseTitle: Track Studio I: Methods and Media
title: Track Methods Portfolio Game
genericDescription: Synthesize track methods; present a refined playable study; connect project to future thesis direction.
specificDescription: Build the strongest track-focused game of the semester. It must combine at least three methods from earlier projects and include an annotated bibliography, influence map, or technical model card as appropriate.
gradingRubric: 30 pts synthesis; 20 pts final play quality; 20 pts track sophistication; 15 pts supporting research artifact; 15 pts presentation.
